description: Daily dev log for the 1.00s project

entries.title: ATT rejection turnaround — v2.0 build 5 submitted to App Review
entries.summary: App Store Connect rejected v2.0 build 4 overnight: 'we are unable to locate the App Tracking Transparency permission request.' One-commit fix, verified on iPad Air 11 + iPhone 16 Pro Max simulators, retagged v2.0 at the actual submitted build, resubmitted before lunch.

entries.title: v2.0 ships — pre-launch audit, iPad-native, App Store resubmit
entries.summary: A 27-commit sprint from outdated v1.x in the App Store to v2.0 tagged on main: deep UX/monetization audit, EEA consent + iOS ATT compliance, polish pass across visuals/onboarding/post-run/audio/a11y, full iPad-native treatment, and a custom-cut promo video for the App Store preview.

entries.title: Orb breathing reborn, leaderboard card, Supabase audit fixes
entries.summary: A marathon day rebuilding how the orb breathes, shipping a refined centrally-overlaid leaderboard card, auditing the Supabase data flow end-to-end, and fixing a critical auth bug that was silently orphaning every cold-launched user's profile.

entries.title: Orb fixes + formal polish pass — phase-drift bug, Extinguish death, glass refinement
entries.summary: Hunted down a phase-drift bug that was killing players at depth 6-7, then did a design-first craft pass on the gameplay orb: unified animation vocabulary, 6-layer Fresnel-rim glass face, fixed-cyan tracking dot, and a new meditative Extinguish death sequence replacing the ring-shatter.

entries.title: Complete UX/UI overhaul — game-as-home, crystal audio, death reveal
entries.summary: Redesigned the entire app flow so the game IS the home screen. Added procedural crystal audio, competitive death reveal, dot speed interpolation, and progressive background darkening.

entries.title: Arcade competition redesign — single-mode app with weekly leaderboards
entries.summary: Redesigned the arcade experience as a single-mode app focused on weekly competition cycles, and added a weekly share card for sharing results.

entries.title: Arcade zen flow, lobby system, mode icons, and loop map overhaul
entries.summary: Massive day — redesigned arcade mode as a zen flow with instant retry, built a full lobby system for arcade and daily challenge, iterated mode nav icons through 6 versions, then overhauled the loop map with a procedural background and 50+ polish passes.

entries.title: Level type redesigns — orbs, arcs, blind zones, and energy paths
entries.summary: Redesigned six level types with new visual mechanics — energy conduit paths, orbital alignment, arc-swing pendulums, ghost orbs, and type-colored glow orbs.

entries.title: Boss icons, star ratings, performance hardening, and closing walls polish
entries.summary: Big day — shipped premium boss orb icons, a full star rating system with celebrations, closing walls gameplay polish, and a comprehensive performance sweep across 5 work streams.
